Title: Machine Learning Applications in Healthcare: A Comprehensive Review
Authors: Smith, John A.; Johnson, Mary B.; Brown, David C.
Abstract: This comprehensive review examines the current state of machine learning applications in healthcare settings. We analyzed 150 studies published between 2020-2023, focusing on diagnostic imaging, drug discovery, and personalized treatment plans.

Title: Deep Learning in Medical Image Analysis: Current Trends and Future Directions
Abstract: Medical image analysis has been revolutionized by deep learning techniques. This systematic review analyzes 200 papers from 2019-2023 focusing on convolutional neural networks, transformers, and generative models.

Title: Natural Language Processing in Electronic Health Records: Opportunities and Challenges
Authors: Garcia, Maria; Lee, Kevin; Patel, Raj
Abstract: Electronic health records contain vast amounts of unstructured text data that could provide valuable insights for clinical research and patient care. This review examines NLP techniques applied to EHR data.
